description_long: This is a three-seater sofa with a boxy, modern silhouette and a dark, textured exterior that resembles distressed or crinkled leather. The seat consists of three individual black cushions, each separated by visible seams, while the backrest features three loose, square pillows in a dark blue-gray color with a subtle diagonal stripe pattern. The armrests are straight, thick, and extend to the same height as the backrest, providing a uniform rectangular profile. The sofa stands on four short, cylindrical legs with a metallic or plastic finish, slightly elevating it off the ground. The overall design is minimalist, with no visible decorative elements or embellishments, making it suitable for urban environments such as lobbies, waiting areas, or modern outdoor patios. The upholstery appears to be durable and easy to clean, emphasizing practicality and comfort.
description: A modern, boxy three-seater sofa with dark, textured upholstery, three black seat cushions, and three blue-gray striped back pillows. It features straight armrests and short cylindrical legs, giving it a sturdy, minimalist look.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thick, straight armrest and the profile of the three back pillows and seat cushions.
description_view_1: Front view displaying all three seat cushions and three blue-gray back pillows, as well as the full width of the armrests.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, highlighting the armrest and the alignment of the cushions.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the continuous, textured back panel and the tops of the three back pillows peeking over the edge.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three individual black seat cushions and three loose, square blue-gray back pillows, all uniform in size and evenly spaced.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, boxy armrests at the same height as the backrest, with a thick, rectangular profile and matching textured upholstery.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, cylindrical legs positioned at the corners, likely metal or plastic, with a simple, exposed design.
attribute_backrest_type: Straight, continuous backrest with three loose, square back cushions; medium height and no visible tufting or segmentation.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Textured, crinkled or distressed leather-like upholstery on the main body; back pillows have a subtle diagonal stripe pattern.
